title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
